content: The City Center Parking is located at 123 Main Street. It offers secure, 24/7 covered parking for all vehicle types including EVs. The facility is equipped with surveillance cameras and security personnel.
Address: 123 Main Street, Downtown. Entrance is via the north gate near the Central Park. Exit is onto 4th Avenue.
Reservations can be made up to 2 weeks in advance. Cancellation is free if done 2 hours before the start time. Payment is expected upon exit or via the app.
For support, call 555-0199 or email support@cityparking.com.
